sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103741" key="tza/ggh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τζάγγη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n103741.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoe, misi . . zancas de nostris Parthicas paria tria</tr_>, Gallienus ap. Trebell.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Claud.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">usum tzangarum . . intra urbem . . nemini liceat usurpare,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Theod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.10.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
